mcpServerTab.intro: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) server exposes governed catalog discovery and SQL execution to external AI agents. Every call is governed by the caller's role — the server never defaults to admin.
mcpServerTab.enableHint: The MCP server is opt-in. Set the {{enableEnvVar}} environment variable to a port and restart the service to enable it. For the local stdio transport, also set {{roleEnvVar}} to a provisa role.
